infosigasp 0.1.0
  • Get started

  • Changelog

Package index

Import data

Download and read the INFOSIGA-SP datasets.

read_infosiga()
Import an INFOSIGA-SP dataset
infosiga_datasets()
List the available INFOSIGA-SP datasets

Downloads and cache

Fetch the source archive and manage the local cache.

infosiga_download()
Download the INFOSIGA-SP source archive
infosiga_cache_dir() infosiga_cache_list() infosiga_cache_clear()
Manage the infosigasp on-disk cache
infosiga_dictionary()
Download the INFOSIGA-SP data dictionary

Package

infosigasp infosigasp-package
infosigasp: Download and Import Traffic Crash Data from INFOSIGA-SP
